label: Kandinsky v2.2

risk_interpretation.en-US: Kandinsky v2.2 black-box audit has not yet produced admitted results. The contract is registered; risk quantification data is not yet available.
risk_interpretation.zh-CN: Kandinsky v2.2 黑盒审计尚未产生已接纳的运行结果。当前仅完成合同注册，暂无可用风险量化数据。

system_gap: no public runnable job contract is admitted yet

label: Stable Diffusion 1.5 + DDIM

risk_interpretation.en-US: Recon attack reaches AUC 0.849, ASR 0.51, and TPR@1%FPR 1.0 on Stable Diffusion 1.5 + DDIM under the current controlled public-subset protocol. This is admitted black-box risk evidence under a fine-tuned / controlled / proxy-shadow-member setting, not a generalized real-world exploit claim.
risk_interpretation.zh-CN: Recon 攻击在当前受控 public-subset 协议下，于 Stable Diffusion 1.5 + DDIM 上达到 AUC 0.849、ASR 0.51、TPR@1%FPR 1.0。这是 fine-tuned / controlled / proxy-shadow-member 语义下的已接纳黑盒风险证据，不应外推为通用真实世界 exploit 结论。

system_gap: runtime contract is live; remaining gap is to surface semantic limits and secondary-track boundaries cleanly in platform copy

label: PIA on CIFAR10 DDPM

risk_interpretation.en-US: PIA gray-box baseline reaches AUC 0.841 and ASR 0.786 on the current admitted protocol. With provisional stochastic-dropout (all_steps), AUC drops to 0.828 and ASR to 0.768, indicating a measurable but limited reduction under the present workspace-verified, adaptive-reviewed setup. This should be read as an inference-time randomization effect on epsilon-trajectory consistency, not as validated privacy protection.
risk_interpretation.zh-CN: PIA 灰盒基线在当前已接纳协议下达到 AUC 0.841、ASR 0.786。采用 provisional stochastic-dropout (all_steps) 后，AUC 降至 0.828、ASR 降至 0.768，说明在当前 workspace-verified、adaptive-reviewed 设置下存在可测但有限的下降。这应被读作 inference-time randomization 对 epsilon-trajectory consistency 的削弱，而不是已验证的隐私保护。

system_gap: gray-box attack and provisional defense are admitted; remaining gap is to expose cost columns and defense wording consistently across system views

label: GSA on DDPM CIFAR10

risk_interpretation.en-US: GSA white-box baseline reaches AUC 0.998 and ASR 0.990 under the current admitted comparison setup. With W-1 strong-v3 full-scale, the defended comparator falls to AUC 0.489 and ASR 0.499, which is near random guessing in the present protocol. This supports strong mitigation under the current white-box comparison setup, but it should not be overstated as benchmark-complete or as global risk elimination.
risk_interpretation.zh-CN: GSA 白盒基线在当前已接纳比较协议下达到 AUC 0.998、ASR 0.990。采用 W-1 strong-v3 full-scale 后，防御侧比较器降至 AUC 0.489、ASR 0.499，在当前协议内接近随机猜测。这支持“当前白盒比较设置下存在强缓解信号”，但不应被表述成 benchmark 已完成，或全局风险已被消除。

system_gap: white-box rerun has produced a stronger admitted attack result; remaining gap is to bridge W-1 into a same-protocol benchmark without overstating benchmark completeness
